name: Ironjaw Kade
dialogue: I chew rocks for breakfast. Literally.
My team hits like a landslide — slow but final.
preBattleLine: Kade cracks his knuckles. The ground shakes.
postDefeatDialogue: Huh. You hit harder than a rockslide.
There’s a witch further down the path. Ember Sable. Watch for fire.
